title: Does (skopeo) generated image needs to be that big ?
body:
Hi,

Not sure if the other repo is looked as close as this one.
Sorry for duplication, feel free to close the issue that does not make sens.

See : https://github.com/containers/image_build/issues/59

---------

Hi,

From a high level point of view, skopeo is a 30MB tool shipped in a 330MB image.
Is there any chance this can be reworked to have an official delivery in a smallest image?

Thanks.

comments.body:
Thanks for reaching out.

Looking at just the binary size is incorrect: the command relies on various dynamic libraries, e.g. for cryptography.

I think we want to continue to rely on Fedora’s RPM builds, so that we are not in the business of securing that supply chain; and breaking RPM dependencies is, generally, risky and hard to maintain over time. That said, there may well be things that could be done without impacting maintainability. If you can identify anything specific, please file a PR.
